channel.title: susi.vidal
channel.description: trying to make cooking fun stay horngry 📧: team@susividal.com

item.title:
My go-to dinner recently! Recipe below!!
Ingredients: -...
item.description:
View on TikTok


My go-to dinner recently! Recipe below!!   Ingredients:  -chicken thighs (bone-in, skin-on *if you want) -Chosen Foods Lemon Garlic Dressing & Marinade  -veggies of your choice: bell pepper, red onion, yellow squash, zucchini  -tzatziki: grated cucumber, greek yogurt, lemon juice, chopped dill, grated garlic, salt, Chosen Foods avocado oil  -quinoa  -mixed greens  -quartered cherry tomatoes  -toppings: fresh mint, feta cheese  Recipe:  -cover chicken thighs in Lemon Garlic marinade, massage. Let sit for 30 min at room temperature or put in the fridge for 1-12 hours. -preheat the oven to 425F, place chicken on a rack and bake for 35min (or until fully cooked). Broil for the last 2 min to make it extra crispy.  -while the chicken is in the oven, chop the veggies. lightly cover in Avocado oil and spices of your choice (I use salt, pepper, smoked paprika, and garlic powder). saute in cast iron over medium-high heat until fully cooked and browned.  -cook quinoa according to the directions on the package  -tzatziki: grate and strain cucumber, mix together all the ingredients listed above. taste and adjust to your liking!  -to assemble the bowl: I like adding mixed greens, quinoa, cooked veggies, tzatziki, tomatoes, baked chicken and toppings. Add Chosen Foods Lemon Garlic Dressing on top for some extra zest! 
@Chosen Foods #ChosenFoodsPartner

item.title: Trail mix ingredients listed below! has the best and most adva...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Trail mix ingredients listed below! has the best and most advanced 5G Network. This summer just got more exciting now that I can use T-Satellites to stay connected! looking forward to sharing my future adventures My go-to trail mix combo: roasted pecans and cashews, pepitas, pistachios, dried craisins, dried cherries, dark chocolate, salt and cinnamon Stellas trail mix: variety of dog treats (training treats, dog chicken jerky, beef sticks) and freeze-dried bananas *make sure the only ingredient is banana :)
@T-Mobile #TMobilePartner

item.title: FIRST SUMMER BBQ 🪩🫶🏼✨ menu below Cocktail -sparkly ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


FIRST SUMMER BBQ 🪩🫶🏼✨ menu below Cocktail -sparkly gin, elderflower, basil cocktail courtesy of my friend Elise :) Appetizer -local tomatoes, burrata, basil and olive oil Meat -smoked tri-tip with chimichurri Veggies / sides -Parmesan salad: bread crumbs, sweet and spicy nuts, vinaigrette, lots of parm! -Potatoes: parboil, cut in half and cook in cast iron with butter, garlic, rosemary until crispy. Top with chives -Carrots: roasted red pepper hummus, carrots, toasted pine nuts, herb-infused olive oil, chopped parsley **recipe inspired by my friend Rory (IG is Rory_gorman) !!! -Cabbage: quartered cabbage, miso mixture (miso, olive oil, soy sauce), ginger/garlic breadcrumbs, top with green onions and fresh lemon TIPS: cover veggies in a high smoke oil (I used @chosenfoods avocado oil) and salt before grilling -if you have thicker carrots I’d parboil them (or remove from direct flame so they don’t burn) -add miso mixture 3-5 min before removing it, otherwise it’ll burn and taste a little rancid/off -PREP AHEAD OF TIME: honestly I barely ‘cooked’ at their house. It was super easy to throw together -have fun !!! (Duh)

item.title: Chia seed pudding time!! Recipe⬇️ *makes 4 jars -2tbsp chia...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Chia seed pudding time!! Recipe⬇️ *makes 4 jars -2tbsp chia seeds (per jar) -2cups milk of choice -1 1/2tbsp sweetener (honey, maple syrup, sugar) -dash of salt -cinnamon -dash of vanilla -toppings: I like to add fresh fruit in the morning !! **you can add whatever you want to them! -add chia seeds to jars, mix milk, sugar, salt, cinnamon, vanilla in a measuring cup. Taste and adjust (you may want it sweeter, I like it barely sweet!) -Add 1/2cup of milk mixture to each jar. Mix well. Put in the fridge. -After 30min-1hour mix again. Otherwise it’ll form hard clumps overnight lol -add back to the fridge and it’s good to eat whenever you want! * lasts 5 days !!
